message:
test(conformance): add masked array adversarial cases (+12)

Masked array adversarial edge cases (12 cases):
- masked_all_masked_sum: reduction when all elements masked
- masked_empty_array: zero-length masked array
- masked_nomask_singleton: scalar with no mask
- masked_fill_value_nan: NaN as fill value
- masked_data_contains_nan: NaN in data (masked out)
- masked_hardmask_unset_attempt: hardmask prevents unmask
- masked_compress_all_false: compress when all masked
- masked_argmax_all_masked: argmax with no valid elements
- masked_broadcast_scalar_mask: broadcasting mask behavior
- masked_reshape_invalid: invalid reshape dimensions
- masked_count_all_valid: count with no masked elements
- masked_getmask_shared: mask view vs copy semantics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@
 | RNG | 26 | 28 | 43 | 97 | Adequate + 39 statistical, small bound, zero-fill, single-step jump |
 | FFT | 47 | 12 | 12 | 71 | Good - transform families, edge sizes, 2D/3D, fftn/ifftn, shifts, fftfreq, inverse/linearity/parseval metamorphic, edge-case adversarial |
 | Datetime/timedelta | 48 | 12 | 12 | 72 | Good - arithmetic, busday, NaT, broadcast, abs, comparisons, neg, mul-zero, add/sub inverse metamorphic, NaT/epoch/y2038 adversarial |
-| Masked arrays | 44 | 12 | — | 56 | Good - reshape/concat/fill/broadcast/all-masked/argmin-max/axis-aware, min/max axis partial, mask preservation metamorphic |
+| Masked arrays | 44 | 12 | 12 | 68 | Good - reshape/concat/fill/broadcast/all-masked/argmin-max/axis-aware, min/max axis partial, mask preservation metamorphic, hardmask/compress adversarial |
 | Iterator/transfer | 37 | 21 | 18 | 76 | Good - transfer/overlap/flatiter/broadcast, single-element, copy-overlap flags |
 | Shape/stride (SCE) | 51 | 12 | — | 63 | Good - 0-D, empty, negative-stride, large shapes, 5D/6D transpose, scalar-to-5D, F-order, reshape/transpose roundtrip metamorphic |
 | Dtype promotion | 198 | 17 | 20 | 235 | Good - full 14×14 type matrix + metamorphic + adversarial, title-case/trailing-space |

@@ -0,0 +1,201 @@
